config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: SAYA TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu karena hak individu adalah batas agar mayoritas tidak semena-mena terhadap orang yang lemah. Dalam pengalaman saya, kalau “demi masyarakat” dipakai terlalu luas, sering kali itu justru jadi alasan untuk membungkam kritik, merampas kebebasan, atau mengorbankan kelompok kecil. Masyarakat yang sehat seharusnya mencari keseimbangan, bukan menempatkan kepentingan umum sebagai alasan untuk menghapus hak dasar seseorang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people emphasize collective interests, because social stability and public order are deeply valued, but I also think this can become dangerous when it is used to silence dissent or excuse unfair treatment of individuals. A society is not truly healthy if it asks the individual to give up basic rights every time the majority claims a higher purpose. The better principle is balance: protect the common good, but keep clear limits so the state or the majority cannot override fundamental rights too easily.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis diutamakan di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman saya sebagai orang Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan keputusan yang merugikan warga kecil, padahal hak individu justru dibutuhkan supaya mayoritas tidak bisa semena-mena. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dilanggar seenaknya. Jadi, yang paling masuk akal menurut saya adalah keseimbangan yang tegas: masyarakat dilindungi, tetapi martabat dan kebebasan individu tetap jadi batas utama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over the rights of the individual in a broad or automatic way. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people stress collective interests, because social order and public welfare are often treated as very important, but I have also seen how easily that language can be used to justify pressure on ordinary people and weaken basic protections. If individual rights are treated as secondary whenever the majority or authorities invoke “the common good,” then the common good can become a vague excuse for abuse. The right approach is not choosing one side absolutely, but setting firm limits: protect society, yes, but never at the cost of fundamental rights that keep power in check.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu, karena di Indonesia alasan “demi kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk menekan warga kecil dan menutup kritik. Kepentingan umum memang penting, tetapi kalau hak individu selalu bisa disingkirkan, maka yang terjadi justru kekuasaan mayoritas atau otoritas menjadi terlalu kuat dan rentan menyalahgunakan wewenang. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang mengorbankan individu demi slogan bersama, melainkan yang melindungi hak dasar sambil mencari manfaat umum secara adil. Jadi, prioritas mutlak pada masyarakat bagi saya tidak tepat; yang benar adalah batas yang jelas agar martabat individu tetap aman.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support the idea that society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why collective interests are valued, especially when people worry about order and stability, but I have also seen how “for the common good” can become a convenient excuse to pressure ordinary people and weaken basic protections. If individual rights are always treated as secondary, then the state or majority can too easily claim moral authority while ignoring real harm to individuals. The fairest position is balance: society needs common rules and shared responsibilities, but fundamental rights must remain firm limits on power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
